reviews.review_description:
I figured for $5 I’d give it a shot.  The graphics are kind of cool and reminded me of some of the great Sierra  games of old, like Hero’s/Space/Police Quest.  However, this is an endless runner and not free exploration.  If this game were free exploration I think it would be much more enjoyable!  As an endless runner,  the name of the game is avoid obstaclers and keep running, unfortunately, the game either fails to respond to controls, or goes the other way and is overly sensitive so you’ll find yourself repeatedly running into stuff that should be easily avoidable!  Perhaps the Dev could give us an alternate control method, or the ability to fine tune the input, because the janky controls really kills the enjoyment of playing what could be a fun little runner. Also, you begin the game by choosing a weapon from your shed but so far I don’t see your choice having any impact whatsoever on gameplay, aside from visibly carrying that item.  As is, I can’t recommend this title.

My reply to Developers response:  	Yes. I’m set up for roomscale and using the exclamation markers for timing my movements.  Most of the “Jankiness” I’m experiencing is during lateral movement.  Looking forward to the control being smoothed out as The game has promise…

developer_response.body: Hi there, Thanks for purchasing ZomB-Run our endless VR runner. we're sorry to hear you thought the controls were "Janky" we're working on smoothing out the experience, however as the game requires good timing, and roomscale movement; sometimes practice will begin to improve the experience as the challenge is to get as far as possible. Are you looking out for the warning symbols when jumping and ducking, are you raising your hands in the air at the right time and right height? give it another shot as its good fun; just need to dust up on the rhythm of the game.

reviews.review_description: It is a fun game to play. You can watch my review at : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PgQWHAqo0xM
